name: Little Plum Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together one cup of sifted flour and the fruit (currants and raisins).
2. Cream the butter until soft.
3. Add the grated lemon rind, nutmeg to the creamed butter mixture.
4. Gradually add the sifted sugar and beaten eggs to the butter mixture, alternating with the milk.
5. Mix in the remaining flour.
6. Form the batter into small cake shapes using a teaspoon.
7. Bake at 450°F (232°C) for about 5-8 minutes until brown on top.
8. Reduce heat to 350°F (177°C) and continue baking for another 5-8 minutes or until golden brown.
